description_long: This nightstand features a simple, modern design with a rectangular top and four angled, tapered wooden legs. The body is a solid block with a single drawer, seamlessly integrated into the front face, giving it a minimalist appearance. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible handles or decorative elements, emphasizing its clean lines. The wood grain is subtly visible, suggesting a natural or lightly finished wood material. The legs are slightly splayed, providing stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. Its compact size makes it suitable for tight spaces, such as beside a bed or in a small urban apartment.
description: A minimalist wooden nightstand with a single drawer and four splayed, tapered legs, finished in a smooth matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat drawer face and the two front legs, with no visible handle.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the two rear legs, with no drawer or handle visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand and the profile of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, showing the other side profile and leg arrangement.
